title: chaenactis glabriuscula var. filifolia
intro: Chaenactis glabriuscula var. filifolia, also known as the Sticky Chaenactis, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant native to British Columbia in Canada. The medicinal properties of Chaenactis glabriuscula var. filifolia include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions and injuries. Traditional herbal preparations of Chaenactis glabriuscula var. filifolia include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall health.
